definition:
1. to have strength  or might, be strong  or mighty , (Sophocles Tragicus); σθ. χερί, ποσί to be strong  in hand, in foot, (Sophocles Tragicus); σθένοντος ἐν πλούτῳ (Sophocles Tragicus); τοσοῦτον σθένει (Sophocles Tragicus); ὅσονπερ ἂν σθένῃ (Sophocles Tragicus); οἱ κάτω σθένοντες they who have power  below, (Euripides) 
2. with infinitive to have strength  or power  to do, be able , (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
